column1: # BETA-1 Standardized Galaxy Cluster Parameters — v1
# Source: geometric/arithmetic means of Claude BETA-0 ranges (data/supplementary_extracted/claude_galaxy_cluster_parameters.csv)
# Purpose: fixed single-valued input for all AI services in BETA-1 controlled replication
# DO NOT MODIFY — changing these values invalidates BETA-1 controlled condition
# Column definitions (matching Appendix A.1 Step 4 schema):
#   time_gyr    : time in billions of years after Big Bang
#   m_a_msun    : characteristic mass of galaxy cluster (solar masses)
#   r_a_mpc     : characteristic radius of galaxy cluster (Mpc)
#   d_cab_mpc   : characteristic distance to neighboring cluster (Mpc)
#   k_a_c2_msun : total kinetic energies of sub-objects / c² (solar masses)
